ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team participates in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Founding year of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that plays in the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, draw, loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee who officiated the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team participates in */,
  "mp" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "d" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "gf" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "ga" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "gd" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "pts_per_mp" REAL /* Points per match */,
  "xg" REAL /* Expected goals */,
  "xga" REAL /* Expected goals against */,
  "xgd" REAL /* Expected goal difference */,
  "xgd_per_90" REAL /* Expected goal difference per 90 minutes */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transfer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the player participates in */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded (for goalkeepers) */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves (for goalkeepers) */,
  "successful_passes" INTEGER /* Number of successful passes */,
  "successful_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
